message:
feat(core): enrich data models with sender_id, refactor pattern overlap and algorithms

- Add sender_id fields to core models for cross-pipeline identity tracking
- Refactor pattern_overlap module with cleaner matching logic
- Update BOCPD algorithm with improved change-point detection parameters
- Adjust conformal prediction intervals and calibration logic

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
